title: Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Ghaziabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises:
Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises!
